short paper accepted at the International Conference on Applied Computing, based on my A+ bachelor thesis.

────────────
PROJECTS
────────────
Fantasy Premier League Graph-RAG Assistant | Python, Neo4j, LangChain, LLMs 3 December 2025 – 15 December 2025
• Built a Graph-RAG FPL assistant combining Neo4j knowledge graphs with LLMs for grounded player insights.
• Implemented deterministic intent routing to select Cypher queries, RAG-based embedding retrieval, or clarification.
• Designed reusable Cypher templates for player stats, fixtures, and season-level analysis.
• Integrated RAG embedding pipelines for player similarity and recommendation using numerical and text-based features.
• Evaluated multiple LLMs (Gemini, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral) across accuracy, latency, and response quality.
ZakAI: Personal AI Assistant | Python, Node.js, FastAPI, langchain, Flutter, Next.js | July 2025 – October 2025
• Built a production-style multimodal AI assistant with Python and Node.js backends and Flutter/Next.js frontends.
• Implemented LLM tool-calling, structured outputs (Pydantic), dynamic routing, and robust logging for observability and debugging.
• Integrated STT (Whisper), TTS (ElevenLabs), vision (Qwen3-VL-2B), and image generation (Stable Diffusion).
• Designed multi-user architecture with JWT authentication, isolated sessions, and persistent chat history.
• Connected external tools (Gmail OAuth2, Weather APIs) through function calling and agent-style orchestration.
AI Tourist Assistant for Cultural Interpretation — Thesis Project (Awarded an A+ Grade) March 2025 – June 2025
Python, React, FastAPI, Google Gemini Flash 2.5
• Designed an AI-powered cultural assistant using RAG, tool calling, and structured LLM outputs.
• Built a router-based backend supporting Cultural Q&A, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Tool Execution.
• Implemented document ingestion and semantic search using Docling, LanceDB, and Nomic embeddings.
• Added geographic reasoning for nearby place recommendations and contextual responses.
• Integrated Whisper STT for real-time voice interaction.
CariGo: Trip Planner Website | React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js, Postman | October 2024 – December 2024

• Developed a MERN stack trip planner platform with JWT authentication for secure access.
• Built REST APIs for itineraries, bookings, and user preferences with Node.js and Express.js.
• Implemented payments system with Stripe integration, including refunds and points redemption.
• Integrated a currency conversion API to display trip prices in users’ preferred currency.
• Automated booking updates and offers via email notifications using Nodemailer.
Database Engine | Java, Serialization, B+ Trees | March 2024 – May 2024

• Implemented table storage using serialized files with B+ tree indices for fast retrieval.
• Developed CRUD operations, schema management, and a custom query function replicating SQL SELECT for data retrieval.
• Optimized memory with on-demand page loading for efficient disk usage.
Database System for Advising Students | SQL, ASP.NET, | September 2023 – January 2024

• Designed a relational database schema for an academic advising system.
• Implemented stored procedures, views, and triggers for business logic and consistency.
• Built an ASP.NET app supporting course scheduling, graduation planning, and payments.

My part is to use (NLP) Natural Language Processing and (OCR) Optical Character Recognition to read the lectures in a textual form suitable for later work by forming questions or electronic correction and evaluating the students and their grades. I used many techniques and many models such as: Similarity (cosine similarity and sequence matcher) Reading PDFs (Tika model) • Computer vision (using OCR model to reading pages of lecture file as images) • Vectorizer (convert text to matrix to find similarity between text) • Subprocess (to deal with cmd to run codes

projects.description: Designed and implemented a RAG system over 3M documents using LangChain and Pinecone, reducing hallucinations by 38% and improving answer relevance by 45% through hybrid retrieval and grounded generation.
Fine-tuned Xception CNN on 50,000+ frames, achieving 96% frame-level accuracy. Deployed via FastAPI and optimized with ONNX, applying augmentations for 12% improved robustness.
Delivered a production-ready POS system used daily, with offline-first architecture and automated reporting. Integrated receipt printing, multi-language UI, and reduced checkout times by ∼70%.

Collaborated in a team to design and implement a supervised ML classification pipeline on a dataset of 500K+ records, including data cleaning, feature engineering, and train/validation splitting. Trained and tuned a Random Forest classifier using cross-validation and hyperparameter optimization, achieving 94% accuracy on the validation set. Evaluated model performance using accuracy and confusion matrices, and compared results against baseline models to ensure robustness and generalization.

Go Play – Cross-Platform Sports Management App | 10/2025 – Present
Go Play is a Flutter-based cross-platform mobile application (Android & iOS) designed to
empower sports organizers and team owners to create and manage tournaments, leagues,
and teams efficiently. The app allows users to schedule matches, track results, view
standings, and access real-time statistics, providing a complete sports management solution.
Developed using Clean Architecture and integrated with RESTful APIs, Go Play ensures
scalable, maintainable, and high-performance code. It features a smooth, intuitive user
experience across platforms and is available on Google Play
ITI Learning Platform – AI-Powered Educational Management System | 07/2025 – 08/2025
A Flutter-based educational system built with Clean Architecture, MVVM, and BLoC.
Features role-based dashboards (Student/Admin/Super Admin), AI-powered Q&A (Gemini
AI), track-based courses, and resource management. Includes multilingual support (EN/AR
with RTL), real-time Firestore updates, and Firebase Cloud Messaging for notifications.
Demonstrates skills in scalable architecture, AI integration, and full-stack Flutter with
Firebase.
